paper_title: Preliminary Checklist of Recent Freshwater Japanese Endemic Diatom Taxa

methods.description: Process for compiling a preliminary checklist of recent freshwater Japanese endemic diatom taxa using published papers and monographs.

steps.description: Compile the recent freshwater diatom taxa described from Japan using published papers and Japanese monographs.
steps.searchable_summary: compile diatom taxa from Japanese publications

steps.description: Examine each taxon on the checklist using the Global Biodiversity Information Facility (GBIF) and Google to search digitized journals.
steps.searchable_summary: search GBIF and Google for diatom taxa information

methods.description: Method to identify and categorize diatom taxa that have not been reported after their first description as Practically Non-existent Species.

steps.description: Identify species that have not been reported after the first description using GBIF and Google searches.
steps.searchable_summary: identify unreported diatom species using GBIF and Google
